product_overview: Mobile React Native app for managing products and orders with image upload, RTL support, and n8n webhook integration. Supports product CRUD, order management, secure API integration and client-side validation.
core_goals: Enable authenticated users to create, read, update and delete products with image upload (camera/gallery) and validation.
Provide a responsive product listing and detail experience with pull-to-refresh and search.
Allow users to manage orders (confirm/delete) via n8n webhook integrations.
Ensure secure API communication with API key headers, request signing, and encrypted storage.
Support RTL languages (Arabic) and a Material Design UI across Android and iOS.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users using email/phone and password so they can access protected product and order screens.
user_flows: Navigate to Login -> Fill login input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Navigate to Products
Navigate to Login -> Fill login input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See 'Invalid credentials' error message -> Stay on Login

features.name: View Products
features.description: Load and display a list of products with support for pull-to-refresh and navigation to product details.
user_flows: Navigate to Products -> Load products -> See products in list -> Tap a product -> Navigate to ProductDetail
Navigate to Products -> Load products -> See 'Failed to load products' error message -> Pull to refresh -> Retry loading products

features.name: Create or Edit Product
features.description: Create a new product or edit an existing one, including adding up to 4 images (camera or gallery), client-side validation, and submission to add/update endpoints.
user_flows: Navigate to ProductForm -> Fill product details -> Add images -> Submit form -> See success confirmation -> Navigate to Products
Navigate to ProductForm -> Fill product details (missing required field) -> Submit form -> See validation error message -> Fill missing field -> Submit form -> See success confirmation
Navigate to ProductForm -> Fill product details -> Add images -> Submit form -> See 'Network error' message -> Stay on ProductForm

features.name: Delete Product
features.description: Delete a specific product from the product list or product detail view after user confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to Products -> See products in list -> Click Delete button on a product -> Confirm deletion -> See product removed from list
Navigate to Products -> See products in list -> Click Delete button on a product -> Cancel deletion -> See product remains in list
Navigate to ProductDetail -> Click Delete button on a product -> Confirm deletion -> See 'Failed to delete product' error message -> Product remains in list

features.name: Manage Orders
features.description: View user orders and trigger confirm/delete actions via configured webhooks to update order state.
user_flows: Navigate to Orders -> View list of orders -> Click confirm order webhook -> See order status updated to confirmed
Navigate to Orders -> View list of orders -> Click delete order webhook -> See 'Failed to delete order' error message -> Order remains in list

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email/phone and password credentials

features.name: Create or Edit Product
features.description: Add a new product or edit an existing one

features.name: Delete Product
user_interactions: Click Delete button on a product
